evidence: await ensure_project_member(db, body.project_id, current_user_sub) validates project membership but never checks article_id belongs to project_id. ExtractionInstance/Run created with unchecked article_id
suggested_action: After ensure_project_member, add an article-ownership check: SELECT 1 FROM articles WHERE id=:aid AND project_id=:pid (or ensure_article_in_project helper).

evidence: _resolve_project_template checks tpl.project_id == project_id (line 147) but never validates that article_id belongs to the same project during instance/run creation
suggested_action: Add article ownership check in open_or_resume before _ensure_instances (or inline in _ensure_instances before INSERT).

evidence: _resolve_project_template raises HITLSessionInputError for wrong-project template_id but no integration test asserts that branch
suggested_action: Add test: pass an extraction template ID belonging to a different project; assert 400 with 'not found in project' detail.

evidence: _resolve_project_template raises HITLSessionInputError on kind mismatch (extraction vs quality_assessment) but no test exercises that branch
suggested_action: Add test: open session with extraction template but kind=quality_assessment in the body; assert 400.

evidence: _reuse_or_create_run uses RunLifecycleService.create_run which captures hitl_config_snapshot but no test asserts the snapshot is present on the Run after session open
suggested_action: In an existing session-open test, fetch the run after open and assert hitl_config_snapshot is a non-empty dict matching the resolved HitlConfig.
